ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the packaged food category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., food, beverage, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_categories" (
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-category */,
  "sub_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the packaged food sub-category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the packaged food */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year" INTEGER /* The year for which sales data is recorded */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* Description of the year (e.g., 'Year 2016') */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Store-Based, E-Commerce) */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of channel (e.g., online, offline, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales entry */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the packaged food */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded sales */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel */,
  "store_sales" REAL /* Total sales from store-based channels */,
  "ecommerce_sales" REAL /* Total sales from e-commerce channels */,
  "cagr" REAL /* Compound annual growth rate (CAGR) from 2016 to 2020 */,
  "quarterly_sales" REAL /* Sales for each quarter of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channel_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the packaged food */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded sales */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Sales amount for the specified category and year */,
  "market_share" REAL /* Market share of the category in the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_mapping_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_mapping_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_mapping_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user authentication */,
  "password" TEXT /* Encrypted password for user authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, client) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "access_channel" TEXT /* Channel used to access the data (e.g., web, mobile, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_data" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the packaged food */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which sales are forecasted */,
  "predicted_sales" REAL /* Predicted sales amount for the specified category and year */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the predicted sales */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis report */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the packaged food */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year covered by the analysis */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis report text */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_location" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_by_location" (
  "sales_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales location entry */,
  "sub_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-category of the packaged food */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded sales */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic location */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Sales amount for the specified category, year, and location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_by_location_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_by_location_sub_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_category_id") REFERENCES sub_categories ("sub_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_by_location_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES geographic_location ("location_id")
)
